nasb.text: “Be careful to listen to all these words which I command you, so that it may be well with you and your sons after you forever, for you will be doing what is good and right in the sight of the Lord your God.

esv.text: Be careful to obey all these words that I command you, that it may go well with you and with your children after you forever, when you do what is good and right in the sight of the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 你要謹慎聽從我吩咐你的這一切話，好使你和你的子子孫孫永遠得享福樂，因為你行了耶和華看為好為正的事。

ccb.text: 你们要认真听从我给你们的这些吩咐，做你们的上帝耶和华视为正与善的事，以便你们及子孙凡事顺利，直到永远。
